chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-5404 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on CMA No.6795/2026 (Urgent Application) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on CMA No.22528/2025 (Exemption Application) 4. For hearing of main case 19.03.2026 Mr. Moazam Ali, Special Prosecutor NAB, Karachi Mr. Qamar Abbas Abbasi, Advocate for Respondent No.1 ----------------- Learned counsel for Respondent No.1 pleads urgency on the ground that the review application has been decided by the NAB Court in terms of order dated 26.01.2026, whereby application under Section 12 of National Accountability Ordinance, 1999 dated 03.01.2025 filed by the NAB has been disposed of therefore purpose of this petition in view of above legal position has become infructuous and the impugned order dated 02.09.2025 has also been recalled. Mr. Moazam Ali, Special Prosecutor, NAB, Karachi present in Court in connection with some other case waives notice and does not wish to press this petition. Accordingly, urgency is granted and in view of above, this petition is dismissed having become infructuous alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
